title: LoopStorm Event
description: Schema for events written to the JSONL audit log and forwarded to the hosted backend. Each line in the JSONL file is one event conforming to this schema.

event_type.description: The type of event. Supervisor event types (supervisor_*) are reserved for the AI Supervisor's own audit trail.

run_id.description: The run this event belongs to. Client-generated UUID v7 (ADR-004).

seq.description: Monotonically increasing sequence number within this run. Canonical ordering field.

hash.description: SHA-256 hex digest of this event's payload (all fields except 'hash' and 'hash_prev').

hash_prev.description: SHA-256 hash of the previous event in this run's chain. Null for the first event (seq=1).

ts.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when this event was created by the engine.

tool.description: Tool name. Present on policy_decision, supervisor_tool_call events.

args_hash.description: SHA-256 of RFC 8785 canonical JSON of the original (pre-redaction) tool arguments.

args_redacted.description: Tool arguments after redaction. Sensitive values replaced with typed markers.

decision.description: The enforcement decision for this call. Present on policy_decision events.

rule_id.description: The policy rule that produced the decision.

reason.description: Human-readable reason for the decision or event.

budget.description: Current budget state at the time of this event.

dimension.description: The budget dimension that triggered a warning or exceeded event (e.g., 'cost_usd', 'call_count').

loop_rule.description: The loop detection rule that fired. Present on loop_detected events.

loop_action.description: The action taken in response to loop detection.

run_status.description: Run lifecycle status. Present on run_started and run_ended events.

policy_pack_id.description: Identifier of the active policy pack.

supervisor_run_id.description: Supervisor run identifier. Present on supervisor_* events.

trigger.description: What triggered the supervisor run. Present on supervisor_run_started.

trigger_run_id.description: The run_id that triggered the supervisor. Present on supervisor_run_started.

proposal_type.description: Type of proposal (e.g., 'budget_adjustment'). Present on supervisor_proposal_created.

target_agent.description: The agent targeted by a supervisor proposal.

confidence.description: Supervisor's confidence in a proposal or assessment.

supporting_runs.description: Run IDs supporting a supervisor proposal.

status.description: Status of a proposal or escalation (e.g., 'pending_approval', 'approved', 'denied').

severity.description: Severity of an escalation or flag.

timeout_seconds.description: Timeout for human response on an escalation.

timeout_action.description: Action if escalation times out without human response.

call_seq_fingerprint.description: SHA-256 of the last N (tool, args_hash) tuples in this run. Rolling window N=5. See specs/behavioral-telemetry.md.

inter_call_ms.description: Milliseconds since the previous DecisionRequest in this run. 0 for the first call. See specs/behavioral-telemetry.md.

token_rate_delta.description: Ratio of this call's token consumption to the run's rolling average. 1.0 = baseline. See specs/behavioral-telemetry.md.

param_shape_hash.description: SHA-256 of the sorted top-level keys of args_redacted. See specs/behavioral-telemetry.md.
